name: python3-uharfbuzz
title: python3-uharfbuzz
summary: Streamlined Cython bindings for the HarfBuzz shaping engine
description:
Streamlined Cython bindings for the HarfBuzz shaping engine
This package provides the Cython-based Python binding for the HarfBuzz
shaping engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-uharfbuzz because Streamlined Cython bindings for the HarfBuzz shaping engine.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-uharfbuzz as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-uharfbuzz with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-uharfbuzz --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
